description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:alpine Docker image. Set a before_script to export GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle and define the GRADLE_OPTS variable as -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, caches the build and .gradle directories with a push policy, and runs the shell command gradle --build-cache assemble. In the test stage add a test job that uses the same cache key with a pull policy, caches the same paths, and runs the command gradle check. The pipeline runs on all branches without additional rules.
